LUMEN

Work Studio Manifesto
Menu
Case Study

The Lighthouse

A24 Films / 2024

Director

Robert Eggers

Cinematography

Jarin Blaschke

Editor

Louise Ford

Format

35mm Black & White

Cannes Film Festival

Winner: FIPRESCI Prize

The challenge was not merely to capture the isolation of late 19th-century maritime life, but to construct a psychological reality where the boundaries of sanity erode with the tides.

Next Project

Neon Demon
